stemHtml: What does "Hard Law" include? (EASA regulatory material)

options.a: Certification Specifications, Acceptable Means of Compliance and Guidance Material.
options.b: Regulations, Delegated Acts, Implementing Acts and Implementing Rules.
options.c: Implementing Rules, Implementing Acts and Certification Specifications.
options.d: Guidance Material, Regulations, Delegated Acts and Implementing Acts.
